# CWE-494 positive: remote bundle executed without integrity check (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-494-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
)

func InstallRemoteWorker(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	resp, err := http.Get(r.URL.Query().Get("bundle_url"))
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	path := "/tmp/worker.bin"
	f, _ := os.Create(path)
	_, _ = io.Copy(f, resp.Body)
	_ = f.Close()
	cmd := exec.Command(path)
	_ = cmd.Run()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
